positive: A stylized, abstract depiction of a whimsical woodland creature, blending elements of a fox, deer, and foxglove flowers. The creature has a sleek, elegant silhouette with vibrant, stylized fur textures in earthy tones (deep teal, burnt orange, forest green). It is posed in a dynamic, confident stance, surrounded by stylized floral and leaf motifs that frame the central subject. The overall composition is balanced and symmetrical, featuring clean lines and high contrast. Use a vintage-woodcut illustration style mixed with modern vector art aesthetics. Flat graphic design style, high detail, intricate linework, deep saturation, suitable for screen printing on fabric, centered, profile view, golden ratio composition.
